identity.canonical_title: Extend This to Protostellar & Protoplanetary Disk Physics (1)

theory.technical_interpretation: Extend This to Protostellar & Protoplanetary Disk Physics (1) is a variational / legendre derivative, written (∂^2 δ ρ)/(∂ t^2) + κ^2 δ ρ = c_s^2 ∇^2 δ ρ. It arises from a variational or Legendre procedure, defining conjugate quantities or stationarity conditions. It is built from ∇, δ, ρ, c_s, defining (∂^2 δ ρ)/(∂ t^2) + κ^2 δ ρ. Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.

formation.note: Introduced in the derivation where use the standard wave equation in rotating fluid disks
